content:
You have been challenging.  
You have brought lots of happiness.  
You also brought along plenty of disappointments.

Now that we are about to partway,  
I would like to tell you how much I appreciate you.

I have become much stronger.  
I have become way calmer.  
I think I am also somewhat wiser, slightly. 

And despite all the disappointments,  
You taught me how to be happy with whatever life brought me.

Wish me luck, 2017.
